wizard.title: AnimaWorks Setup
wizard.subtitle: Digital Anima Framework - Initial Setup
lang.title: Select Your Language
lang.desc: Choose the display language for the setup wizard and UI.
lang.label: Display Language
lang.preview.title: Preview
lang.preview.text: The setup will proceed in this language. AnimaWorks is a framework that treats AI agents as autonomous "animas". Each Anima has their own identity, memory, and decision-making criteria, and acts autonomously.
env.title: Environment Setup
env.desc: Detect your runtime environment and configure API keys.
env.provider.title: LLM Provider
env.provider.claude_code.desc: Via Claude Code CLI. No API key needed
env.provider.anthropic.desc: Claude models (API key or subscription auth)
env.anthropic.auth.title: Anthropic Auth Method
env.anthropic.auth.api_key.desc: Connect with a standard API key
env.anthropic.auth.subscription.desc: Use your Claude Pro/Max plan login via Claude Code CLI
env.anthropic.status.ready: Claude Code CLI detected. Subscription auth is available
env.anthropic.status.not_installed: Claude Code CLI not found. Please install it first
env.provider.openai.desc: Use either an OpenAI API key or Codex login
env.openai.auth.title: OpenAI Auth Method
env.openai.auth.api_key.desc: Connect with a standard API key
env.openai.auth.codex_login.desc: Use your Codex subscription login state
env.codex.status.ready: Codex CLI is installed and logged in
env.codex.status.not_logged_in: Codex CLI is available but not logged in
env.codex.browser.instructions: Open the URL below and enter the device code to sign in with ChatGPT.
env.provider.ollama.desc: Local models. No API key needed
env.imagegen.title: Image Generation APIs (Optional)
env.imagegen.desc: Used for character image generation. You can configure these later.
env.imagestyle.desc: Choose a style for character images. Both asset types can be generated and switched via theme toggle.
env.imagestyle.realistic.desc: Photorealistic portraits. Best for business use
leader.title: Create Leader
leader.desc: Choose a name for your first digital anima (the organization's leader).
leader.label: Name (alphabetic)
leader.hint: Only alphabetic characters are allowed. Will be converted to lowercase.
leader.error: Please enter a name using only alphabetic characters
userinfo.title: Tell Us About Yourself
userinfo.desc: Enter your information so Animas can recognize you.
userinfo.name: Username
userinfo.name.hint: Alphanumeric characters and underscores only. Will be converted to lowercase.
userinfo.bio.placeholder: Tell us about yourself — hobbies, work, interests...
userinfo.error: Please enter a username using only alphanumeric characters or underscores
confirm.title: Review Your Settings
confirm.desc: Setup will be completed with the following settings.
error.codex_login_required: Run `codex login` before choosing Codex Login
error.claude_code_login_required: Install and log in to Claude Code CLI to use subscription auth
env.provider.cursor_agent.desc: Via Cursor Agent CLI. Run `agent login` first
env.cursor_agent.status.ready: Cursor Agent CLI is installed and authenticated
env.cursor_agent.status.not_logged_in: Cursor Agent CLI is installed but not authenticated. Run `agent login` first
env.cursor_agent.status.not_installed: Cursor Agent CLI is not installed
env.provider.gemini_cli.desc: Via Gemini CLI. Run `gemini auth login` first
env.gemini_cli.status.not_logged_in: Gemini CLI is installed but not authenticated. Run `gemini auth login` or set GEMINI_API_KEY
error.cursor_agent_auth_required: Run `agent login` before choosing Cursor Agent
error.gemini_auth_required: Run `gemini auth login` or set GEMINI_API_KEY before choosing Gemini CLI
